name: Brunn
description: =Brunnberget=(även Ramelsberget på kartan) Klippa synlig från riksväg 40 genom Ulricehamn. Lär ha en del fin trad, ca 20 m hög.30 m är den längsta leden. 2010-04-21: OBS!!! Störningskänslig häckningslokal, klätterförbud till och med 15/7. Störning har observerats och området är under bevakning. /Johan Svensson, accessansvarig i Bohusläns kk Klippan är tyvär blöt ganska ofta men det är rolig klättring och sköna grepp på den formationsrika gnejsen. Testa fucking hard 8+9-, kanske den hårdaste turen öster om götet. Fyll i mer du som vet! Stämmer den här kartan?

Led 9 The Sheild grad 7 2bb mix Ankare FA Martin Svensson

blocks.text: Led 18 Fucking hard bb blad bult grad 8-/9- Martin Svensson
Led 19 Finger sprickan grad 6 FA Martin Svensson.

description.text: =Brunnberget= (also Ramelsberget on the map) A crag visible from Route 40 through Ulricehamn. Said to have some fine trad, around 20 m high. The longest route is 30 m. 2010-04-21: NOTE!!! Sensitive nesting site; climbing prohibited up to and including 15/7. Disturbance has been observed and the area is being monitored. /Johan Svensson, access officer for Bohusläns KK. Unfortunately, the crag is often wet, but the climbing is fun, with good holds on the highly featured gneiss. Try fucking hard 8+9-, perhaps the hardest route east of Gothenburg. Add more if you know the area! Is this map correct?

body.text:
Route 1, grade 6+. FA Martin Svensson

Route 2, grade 7+, mixed, anchor. FA Martin Svensson

Route 3, grade 8, bolt. FA Martin Svensson

Route 4, grade 5+, trad. FA unknown

Route 5: obvious corner formation leading to the roof, grade 5, trad. FA Martin Svensson.

Route 6: 1 bolt. Starts in the overhang and leads to a large corner, grade 5. Winter grade M5+. FA Martin Svensson/Marcus Santana.

Route 7: starts in the middle of the large arch, 2 bolts, mixed. Continue straight up to the large ledge above the roof, grade 6+. Winter grade M7+. FA Martin Svensson

Route 8: the classic, 3 bolts. Belay in the alcove above the roof among crack formations, grade 5+. FA Martin Svensson.

Route 9: The Sheild, grade 7, 2 bolts, mixed, anchor. FA Martin Svensson

Route 10: Röen, 6-, trad. FA unknown. Winter variant, ground-up FA, M5. FA Martin Svensson.

Route 11: Slabben, grade 6, bolt, anchor. FA Martin Svensson

Route 12: Diedret, trad. FA unknown

Route 13: Layback sprickan, grade 4, trad. FA unknown

Route 14: Killern, bolt, 7-, anchor. Winter ascent M7. FA Martin Svensson/Marcus Santana

Route 15: grade 7-, bolt, anchor. FA Martin Svensson/Marcus Santana

Route 16: grade 4+, bolt. FA Martin Svensson

Route 17: Finger sprickan, grade 6. FA Martin Svensson

Route 18: Fucking hard, bolt, blade peg, grade 8-/9-. Martin Svensson

Route 19: Finger sprickan, grade 6. FA Martin Svensson.

For more information, contact [martin@mwsguide.com]

Martin Svensson

Mountain guide, 7 Route Village, Argentière, France
